original_query: select p_brand, p_type, p_size, count(distinct ps_suppkey) as supplier_cnt from partsupp, part where p_partkey = ps_partkey and p_brand <> 'Brand#43' and p_type not like 'MEDIUM BURNISHED%' and p_size in (48, 45, 42, 31, 44, 33, 50, 3) and ps_suppkey not in ( select s_suppkey from supplier where s_comment like '%Customer%Complaints%' ) group by p_brand, p_type, p_size order by supplier_cnt desc, p_brand, p_type, p_size;
rewritten_query:
SELECT p.p_brand, p.p_type, p.p_size, COUNT(DISTINCT ps.ps_suppkey) AS supplier_cnt
FROM part p
JOIN partsupp ps ON p.p_partkey = ps.ps_partkey
WHERE p.p_brand <> 'Brand#43'
  AND p.p_type NOT LIKE 'MEDIUM BURNISHED%'
  AND p.p_size IN (48, 45, 42, 31, 44, 33, 50, 3)
  AND ps.ps_suppkey NOT IN (
    SELECT s_suppkey 
    FROM supplier 
    WHERE s_comment LIKE '%Customer%Complaints%'
  )
GROUP BY p.p_brand, p.p_type, p.p_size
ORDER BY supplier_cnt DESC, p.p_brand, p.p_type, p.p_size;

rewrite_suggestion.produced_suggestion: Replaced implicit joins with explicit JOIN syntax for better readability
Kept the NOT IN subquery as it's already efficient with the current execution plan
